description: Anti-over-claim guard. A single-hop question that plain chained recall already answers without any relations. Relation-aware recall must NOT regress this (it must still return the answer) and must NOT invent a spurious multi-hop path. Proves relations earn their keep only where genuinely needed.

episodes.summary: Carol prefers rebase over merge commits.

question: What does Carol prefer for integrating branches?

chained_recall.note: single recall on subject carol returns the preference

relation_aware.note: no relations to traverse; must equal the chained_recall result, proving no regression and no spurious expansion
